title: Qilby Industries
body:
# About
Qilby industries is a Tech-focussed modpack with a hint of magic. It’s mostly centered around Gregtech, with a progression that will eventually be possible all the way to Max voltage.

# Key mods of the pack
Those are the mods that you will spend the more time interacting with during main progression
- [Gregtech CEu Modern](https://modrinth.com/mod/gregtechceu-modern) is the main tech mod and the core focus of the pack. The packs also comes with [a](https://modrinth.com/mod/gtmoremachine) [number](https://modrinth.com/mod/gtnn) [of](https://modrinth.com/mod/gregtech-modern-utilities) [Gregtech](https://modrinth.com/mod/gregtech-steam-expansion) [Addons](https://modrinth.com/mod/gt-community-additions), [including our own](https://modrinth.com/mod/qilby-core) providing integration with the other mods of the pack
- [Botania](https://modrinth.com/mod/botania) and [Hex Casting](https://modrinth.com/mod/hex-casting) are the main mods providing a magical flair to the pack, and will be instrumental for the progression.

Along with a plethora of other mods for a total of 175

# Peformance
The pack can run with 6 GB of RAM if playing on a server or 8 GB in singleplayer, with a recomended 12 GB minimum

# Notes
Here are several special behaviours that we haven't figured how to fix, or properly package the configuration for in the pack
## OPAC Forceloading
Forceloading via Open Parties and Claims doesn't work reliably. Use the chunkloaders from Simple Chunkloaders instead
## OPAC Claims on Botania
Botania mana bursts don't work inside OPAC claims by default. On servers that can be fixed by whitelisting the mana burst in the OPAC server config in the world’s folder. We haven’t found a way to ship that updated config with the pack. In single player you can simply not use OPAC features.
<details><summary>Config change</summary>
  
`world/serverconfig/openpartiesandclaims-server.toml`
```toml
[serverConfig.claims.protection]
forcedEntityProtectionExceptionList = [..., "interact$botania:mana_burst"]
entitiesAllowedToGrief = [..., "interact$botania:mana_burst"]
```

</details>
